---
title: "Guidethrough: Ipeadata API"
format: 
  gfm: default
editor: source
---


<!------------->
<!-- SUMMARY -->
<!------------->

## Briefing

<p>
|       This repo is a useful tool that helps accessing Ipeadata^[https://www.ipeadata.gov.br/Default.aspx] info through API. It contains several databases involving three main areas: Macroeconomics, Regional and Social data. Further details are available here:

|       Readme - User Guide [en-us](readme_en_us.md)
|       Leiame - Manual [pt-br](readme_pt_br.md)
</p>
